name: Roquefort Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow the cheese and butter to come to room temperature.
2. Whip the cream and set aside.
3. Beat the egg white until stiff and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolk.
5. Add the Roquefort cheese and beat until smooth.
6. Add the cream cheese and butter, then beat until smooth.
7. Dissolve the gelatin in cold water, place it in hot water to melt, stirring until dissolved.
8. Add the gelatin and Dijon mustard to the cheese mixture.
9. Gently fold in the egg white, then gently fold in the whipped cream.
10. Pour into a greased mold.
11. Chill thoroughly.
12. Serve with crackers or fruit.
